title: Change landing page background color to red

requirements.text: Update the frontend theme styling so the application background renders as red (i.e., the Tailwind `bg-background` color used by the landing page). Apply the change consistently for both light and dark mode so the background remains red regardless of mode.

quotes: change the background colour to red

acceptanceCriteria: On the landing page, the full-page background is red (covers the entire viewport).
Switching between light and dark mode does not change the background away from red.

requirements.text: Ensure foreground text remains readable against the new red background by adjusting theme foreground variables/classes as needed while keeping the background red.

quotes: change the background colour to red

acceptanceCriteria: Hero title, subtitle, header links, and footer text have sufficient contrast and are comfortably readable on the red background.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/immutablePaths (e.g., frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/components/ui).
Keep the backend as-is (no backend changes required for a background color update).
nonGoals: Do not redesign the landing page layout or change copy/content beyond any minimal readability adjustments required by the red background.
Do not add new pages, routes, or backend methods.
